title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Maersk India

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Fleet Manager at Maersk India
jsonLd.description:
Join the Maersk India family as a Fleet Manager in Vijayawada. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Maersk India:
Maersk India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Maersk India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
